findings.title: Off-by-one out-of-bounds write in scale_buffer
findings.description: Inclusive range 0..=len causes ptr::write one element past the slice boundary

findings.title: Unbounded name copy in add_item via unsafe ptr::copy_nonoverlapping
findings.description: User-supplied name length not validated against 32-byte destination before copy

findings.title: Heap buffer overflow via u16 truncation in merge_strings
findings.description: u16 accumulator wraps around for large inputs causing undersized allocation

findings.title: Integer overflow in process_raw_packet allocation size
findings.description: Attacker-controlled count and elem_size used with unchecked Layout creation
